text.title: Slash-Command Surface for PR Review Bots Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to wire a slash-command-driven review bot end-to-end.

step.name: pick-bot
step.action: Pick Qodo Merge (most full slash surface) / CodeRabbit / Sourcery.
step.decision-gate: If "no third-party app + no self-host" policy, STOP.

step.name: install-app
step.action: Install GitHub app OR add self-hosted Action; configure org/repo permissions; add LLM key to repo secrets.

step.name: commit-workflow
step.action: Commit qodo-merge.yml with auto_describe=true, auto_review=true, auto_improve=false, listening for pull_request + issue_comment events, gated on sender.type != Bot.

step.name: add-pr-template
step.action: Add AUTO-DESCRIBE-START/END markers so the bot's edits stay inside the block.

step.name: validate-config
step.input: workflow file (parsed to JSON via yq)
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-slash-command-surface.py --file workflow.json` to confirm schema + forbidden patterns.
